2604.28039.title: SpecVQA: A Benchmark for Spectral Understanding and Visual Question Answering in Scientific Images
2604.28039.paper_summary: Spectra are a prevalent yet highly information-dense form of scientific imagery, presenting substantial challenges to multimodal large language models (MLLMs) due to their unstructured and domain-specific characteristics. Here we introduce SpecVQA, a professional scientific-image benchmark for evaluating multimodal models on scientific spectral understanding, covering 7 representative spectrum types with expert-annotated question-answer pairs. The aim comprises two aspects: spectra scientific QA evaluation and corresponding underlying task evaluation. SpecVQA contains 620 figures and 3100 QA pairs curated from peer-reviewed literature, targeting both direct information extraction and domain-specific reasoning. To effectively reduce token length while preserving essential curve characteristics, we propose a spectral data sampling and interpolation reconstruction approach. Ablation studies further confirm that the approach achieves substantial performance improvements on the proposed benchmark. We test the capability of prominent MLLMs in scientific spectral understanding on our benchmark and present a leaderboard. This work represents an essential step toward enhancing spectral understanding in multimodal large models and suggests promising directions for extending visual-language models to broader scientific research and data analysis.
2604.28039.paper_summary_zh: 光譜是一種普遍存在但信息密度極高的科學影像形式，由於其非結構化和特定領域的特性，對多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）提出了重大挑戰。<lb/>在此，我們介紹了SpecVQA，一個專業的科學影像基準，用於評估多模態模型在科學光譜理解方面的表現，涵蓋了7種具有代表性的光譜類型，並附有專家標註的問答對。<lb/>其目標包括兩個方面：光譜科學問答評估和相應的基礎任務評估。<lb/>SpecVQA包含620幅圖形和3100對來自同行評審文獻的問答對，針對直接的信息提取和特定領域的推理。<lb/>為了有效減少標記長度，同時保留基本的曲線特徵，我們提出了一種光譜數據採樣和插值重建的方法。<lb/>消融研究進一步確認該方法在所提出的基準上實現了顯著的性能提升。<lb/>我們在基準上測試了著名的MLLMs在科學光譜理解方面的能力，並呈現了一個排行榜。<lb/>這項工作代表了在多模態大型模型中增強光譜理解的重要一步，並為擴展視覺-語言模型到更廣泛的科學研究和數據分析提供了有前景的方向。
2604.28039.author: Jialu Shen et.al.
2604.28039.authors: Jialu Shen, Han Lyu, Suyang Zhong, Hanzheng Li, Haoyi Tao, Nan Wang, Changhong Chen, Xi Fang
